local-phase.label: Local Phase Executor
local-phase.description: Local-only dry-run executor for orchestration phases that emits synthetic handoff payloads.

local-control.label: Local Control Executor
local-control.description: Control-path dry-run executor for policy-routed orchestration phases; behavior matches local-phase with explicit executor routing evidence.

local-merge-gate.label: Local Merge Gate Executor
local-merge-gate.description: Local-only dry-run executor for merge-gate validation across parallel handoffs.
